users.reason: To set presence on behalf of Navidrome users

http.reason: To set presence and refresh tokens with Discord, and look up album art

kvstore.reason: To persist each user's Discord token and session

scheduler.reason: To keep the presence session alive on long tracks

users.title: User bindings
users.description: One entry per Navidrome user that should broadcast presence.

token.title: Auth value
token.description: The auth value from the connect page, or a raw Discord refresh token.

config.title: Look config
config.description: Optional card design from the connect page. Leave blank for the default card.

art_providers.title: Album art providers
art_providers.description: Ordered art sources for the whole instance, the first match wins. Remove one to disable it, reorder for priority, or leave the list empty for no art.
